case_title: SCOTT, LEE vs. KRAGELAND, LOUISE et al

docket_entries.description: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT KRAGELAND, LOUISE HEARING SET FOR SEP-16-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF SEP-16-1996, OFF CALENDAR FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED.
